name: polars-documentation-search
title: Polars Documentation Search
description: Quickly search through official Polars documentation
author: FariaF22

commands.name: polars-docs
commands.title: Polars Docs
commands.subtitle: Search through Polars documentation
commands.description: Search Polars API reference and preview documentation inside Raycast.

preferences.name: useShortPrefix
preferences.title: Use Short Prefix
preferences.label: Use short aliases (pl/df/s/lf)
preferences.description: Show short aliases in docs previews (for example, 'polars.'->'pl.', 'DataFrame'->'df', 'Series'->'s', and 'LazyFrame/LazyDataFrame'->'lf').

preferences.name: hideApiItems
preferences.title: Hide API Items
preferences.label: Hide symbols starting with 'api'
preferences.description: Hide entries whose symbol path starts with 'api'.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
